expected_failure_modes: Agent may hover indefinitely to collect dense position rewards without completing landing.
Over‑reliance on vertical position reward could cause fast descent near ground, compensated by descent rate term.
Stability component may be overpowered, making the agent risk‑averse to necessary tilting for translation.
risk_notes: Assumes y_pos ≥ 0 (altitude above ground) for vertical approach formula; if negative, clip to 0 still works.
Descent rate target of -0.5 m/s is arbitrary and may not match physical limits; tuning needed.
Terminal bonus lacks a timeout override; agent might learn to prematurely trigger legs contact.
